problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: Shape memory alloy phase transition may resolve What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
